p.strong: Architecture: Complete Enum with Milestone Production Map

div.p: 🟢 Produced in M1 🔵 Produced in M2 🟣 Produced in M3 ⬜ Declared M1, emitted later
sizeof(Token) = 4 fields type: TokenType — enum member lexeme: str — raw source slice O(k) line: int — 1-based, ≥ 1 column: int — 1-based, ≥ 1, resets after \n
M1 — Foundation (13 types produced) PLUS MINUS STAR SLASH ASSIGN LPAREN RPAREN LBRACE RBRACE LBRACKET RBRACKET SEMICOLON COMMA EOF ERROR All 26 types declared in M1 enum
M2 — Multi-char & Identifiers (adds 9) EQUAL_EQUAL BANG_EQUAL LESS LESS_EQUAL GREATER GREATER_EQUAL NUMBER IDENTIFIER KEYWORD ASSIGN now via lookahead; = removed from SINGLE_CHAR_TOKENS
M3 — Strings & Comments (adds 1) STRING / removed from SINGLE_CHAR_TOKENS Comments produce 0 tokens
NUMBER = auto() 42 0 3.14 ⬜ declared M1 → 🔵 emitted M2
STRING = auto() "hello world" ⬜ declared M1 → 🟣 emitted M3
IDENTIFIER = auto() x my_var _count ⬜ declared M1 → 🔵 emitted M2
KEYWORD = auto() if else while return true false null ⬜ declared M1 → 🔵 emitted M2
EOF = auto() lexeme="" always last token Parser end-of-stream signal 🟢 M1
ERROR = auto() Unrecognized char / lexical error Enables error recovery — scan continues 🟢 M1
